response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong technical depth across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, code generators). Her experience spans staff-level roles, founder-led projects, and hands-on work with AI-native environments. However, her background leans more toward full-stack and AI-agent tooling rather than pure distributed systems leadership, and her operational ownership experience is less explicit.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators), aligning well with agentic development expectations
Proven leadership in staff-level roles and founder-led projects, demonstrating technical strategy and cross-functional stakeholder management
concerns: Limited explicit mention of operational ownership or on-call rotations, which is a core requirement for this role
Primary language expertise is TypeScript/JavaScript; Python depth is not clearly highlighted despite being a must-have skill
Agile methodology experience is implied but not explicitly detailed (e.g., sprint ceremonies or scrum champion rotation)
